item.title: Topolski's Chronicle, V.5 Index, List of Drawings, 1957
item.creator: Topolski, Feliks, 1907-1989
item.description: Topolski's Chronicle is a series of broadsheets created by Feliks Topolski and distributed bimonthly to subscribers from 1953 through 1982. Topolski was a superlative draughtsman and covered current events with an artistic, unique style.

pages.typeset_text:

pages.page_summary: This page from Topolski's Chronicle Volume V (1957) is a detailed list of drawings covering diverse subjects including Middle Eastern scenes, the Royal visit to Portugal and America, fashion collections, cultural events, and notable personalities such as Queen Elizabeth II, Joyce Cary, and Eugene Ionesco.
